column7: I'm Asha from Aster Hospitals. Is this a good time to speak for a minute regarding your missed appointment?

column6: Great. Which language are you comfortable with? English or Kannada?
Okay. We noticed you missed your visit at Aster RV Bangalore JP Nagar. May I know the reason for this?
Thank you for clarifying. There might be a delay in our system update. Is there anything else I can help you with?
I think thank you. I have an appointment on 18th April.
I couldn't catch that properly. Could you please speak a bit louder or closer to the mic?
Thank you for clarifying. There might be a delay in our system update. Is there anything else I can help you with?
Thank you for your feedback. Thank you for your time. Have a great day. Goodbye.
